description_long: This sculpture depicts a robed male figure standing upright, adorned with a draped cloak and a circular halo above his head. The figure holds a spear or staff in his right hand and gestures downward with his left, suggesting a narrative or symbolic pose. The attire is detailed, with folds in the fabric and a sash across the chest, and the figure wears boots. The sculpture is mounted on a roughly hewn pedestal base, and the overall surface appears weathered, with a stone-like texture. The halo is a thin metallic ring, contrasting with the otherwise stone-gray appearance. The back of the sculpture shows the cloak cascading down in heavy folds, and the figure's head is slightly bowed.
description: A weathered stone-like statue of a robed male figure with a metallic halo, holding a spear and standing on a pedestal. The sculpture features detailed drapery and a narrative pose.
description_view_0: Front view showing the figure's face, draped cloak, sash, and the spear held upright in the right hand, with the metallic halo clearly visible.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the depth of the cloak, the profile of the face, and the forward extension of the left arm.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the full length of the cloak, the back of the head, and the circular halo, with minimal detail on the face or front.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the side profile of the figure, the spear, and the layered folds of the cloak.
attribute_subject_matter: robed male figure with halo and spear
attribute_location_context: No visible context; isolated on a white background.
